fields.label: Background Type
fields.name: background_type
fields.instructions: Choose the type of background for the slider section

fields.label: Background Image
fields.name: background_image
fields.instructions: Upload a background image for the slider section

fields.label: Gradient Start Color
fields.name: gradient_start_color
fields.instructions: Select the starting color for the gradient

fields.label: Gradient End Color
fields.name: gradient_end_color
fields.instructions: Select the ending color for the gradient

fields.label: Gradient Direction
fields.name: gradient_direction
fields.instructions: Select the direction of the gradient

fields.label: Heading (First Part)
fields.name: heading
fields.instructions: Enter the first part of the heading (e.g., "Our")

fields.label: Heading Color
fields.name: heading_color
fields.instructions: Color for the main heading text (applies to heading and all slide titles)

fields.label: Heading (Highlighted Part)
fields.name: heading_span_text
fields.instructions: Enter the highlighted part of the heading (e.g., "Work")

fields.label: Heading Span Color
fields.name: heading_span_color
fields.instructions: Color for the highlighted span text in heading

fields.label: Subheading
fields.name: subheading
fields.instructions: Enter the subheading/description text below the main heading
fields.default_value: Powered solutions enabling intelligent automation, smarter document management, and enhanced enterprise collaboration across industries.

fields.label: Subheading Color
fields.name: subheading_color
fields.instructions: Color for the subheading text (applies to subheading and all slide descriptions)

fields.label: Slides
fields.name: slides
fields.instructions: Add slides to the work slider. Each slide will inherit the colors set above.

sub_fields.label: Slide Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an image for this slide

sub_fields.label: Slide Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the title for this slide (will use the heading color set above)

sub_fields.label: Slide Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the description for this slide (will use the subheading color set above)
